question.text: The NISM Series XV exam has which structure?

answer.text: 80 MCQs (1 mark each) plus 5 case-based questions (4 questions per case at 1 mark), totaling 100 marks

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The exam has 80 MCQs (80 marks) + 5 cases x 4 questions (20 marks) = 100 marks. Duration 2 hours, pass 60%, negative marking 25%. **The Trap:** The case-based component (20 marks) is significant. Many candidates focus only on MCQ preparation. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 15 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** With 25% negative marking, attempt questions with at least 50% confidence. Random guessing has zero expected value.
